Trusted Legal Solutionsfor Startups, Businesses & Individuals


Professional legal guidance for company registration, trademarks, GST, contracts, compliance, and strategic business growth. Powered by advanced legal AI.

Instant Legal GuidancePowered by LexAssist AI


Ask questions about our legal services, explore legal resources, or upload your own PDF documents to receive AI-powered answers based on trusted knowledge. Available instantly.

Trusted by over 500+ forward-thinking startups and established enterprise businesses


Comprehensive Legal ServicesDesigned for Modern Businesses


From business registration to intellectual property protection and compliance management, our legal experts help startups, entrepreneurs, and growing businesses navigate every legal requirement with confidence.


Company Registration


Corporate Setup

Register your Private Limited Company, LLP, Partnership Firm, or OPC with expert legal guidance and fast documentation.

- ✓Fast name approvals & DSC setup
- ✓Complete legal documentation checks
- ✓Post-incorporation advisory support


Trademark Registration


Brand Security

Protect your brand identity with end-to-end trademark registration, conflict reports, and legal assistance.

- ✓Class selection and conflict checks
- ✓Application filing within 24 hours
- ✓Objection handling guidelines


GST Registration


Tax Compliance

Complete GST registration and compliance support for businesses and service operators of every size.

- ✓Application status tracking
- ✓State filing threshold reviews
- ✓Post-registration tax advisory


Business Compliance


Corporate Audits

Stay compliant with annual filings, ROC requirements, board resolutions, and regulatory auditing obligations.

- ✓Annual board meetings minutes logs
- ✓Balance sheet reviews & filing checks
- ✓Director Report structures


Contract Drafting


Document Drafting

Professionally drafted legal agreements including employment contracts, NDAs, service agreements, and custom policies.

- ✓Custom liability protection clauses
- ✓Startups standard NDAs options
- ✓Draft checks by senior counsel


Startup Advisory


Capital Support

Legal support for startups covering incorporation setup, capitalization tables, funding readiness, and ESOPs.

- ✓Venture-backed cap table structures
- ✓Funding Term Sheet compliance audit
- ✓ESOP allocation guidelines


Legal Consultation


Expert Advice

Book one-on-one consultations with experienced legal professionals for personalized business guidance.

- ✓Direct phone/video scheduling
- ✓Contract analysis prep audits
- ✓Case review checklists


Intellectual Property


Invention Audit

Protect your inventions, copyrights, trade secrets, patents, and other critical intellectual property assets.

- ✓Patentability searches audits
- ✓Copyright application filing templates
- ✓IP assignment clauses reviews


Need help choosing the right legal service?


Our legal experts and AI Legal Assistant are here to guide you. Book a free consultation or ask our chatbot directly.


Our Practice Disciplines


Delivering precision-guided legal advice tailored to startups, high-growth companies, and individuals.


Corporate Law


Mergers, acquisitions, joint ventures, corporate governance, and shareholder agreements.


Startup Legal


Cap table structuring, equity incentive plans (ESOPs), advisory agreements, and angel round compliance.


Trademark & IP


Trademark filings, copyright protection, IP licensing, patents, and copyright audits.


Tax & GST


Tax planning, corporate tax compliance, GST audit setups, and transactional advisory.


Contract Law


Drafting, review, auditing, commercial agreements, NDAs, and liability shielding.


Employment Law


Employee handbook policies, NDAs, non-compete clauses, and employment dispute advising.


Consumer Rights


Compliance audits under consumer protection rules, liability protection, and terms of service drafting.


Property Documentation


Lease agreements, commercial real estate audits, property diligence, and title search checks.


Why Forward-Thinking Businesses Choose LexAssist


We combine legal expertise with modern technology to deliver fast, secure, and transparent legal solutions.


Expert Lawyers


Access seasoned legal specialists with extensive corporate advisory experience.


Transparent Pricing


Clear, upfront flat-rate pricing. No hidden fees or surprise hourly invoices.


Fast Documentation


Fast incorporation and drafting workflows driven by legal automation tools.


Secure Process


Your uploaded contracts and business data are protected with 256-bit encryption.


AI Assisted Support


Get instant answers to simple questions and document drafts generated by our legal AI.


Trusted Business Partner


We act as your long-term compliance partner, supporting your company from registration to funding.


How LexAssist Works


A simple, transparent 5-step process designed to guide your business through legal compliance.


Book Consultation


Schedule a free consultation with our legal specialists to discuss your business needs.


Requirement Analysis


Our team and AI auditor analyze your documents and compile compliance guidelines.


Document Collection


Upload required files through our encrypted portal for audit preparation.


Legal Processing


Our corporate lawyers draft, audit, and finalize filings for submission.


Successful Completion


Receive finalized, legally audited compliance documents.
